columns.extraction_plan: Chunk 4 (Table 2) reports 'Time to worsening disease-related symptoms'. This measures specific physical symptoms and does not align with the definition of an 'overall Quality of Life Scale' which assesses general well-being and satisfaction with health status (a measure of the participants' overall well-being and satisfaction with their health status, as assessed through a standardized questionnaire or survey, reflecting their perceived quality of life during the clinical trial?). No other provided chunk reports a measure that fits the definition of an overall Quality of Life Scale. Therefore, an overall Quality of Life Scale is not reported.
